title: Visual Bee Items
description: Shows you what's inside bee nests and hives
body:
Visual Bee Items fully displays the contents of bee nests and beehives on the item, allowing you to see how many bees and how much honey is in the block.
[OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/) is required for this resourcepack to work.
The honey level textures are taken from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://www.vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/).
Planned Features - Vanilla support - Displaying baby bees in hives

Terms of usage
If you use or feature this resourcepack through any medium (PMC, YouTube, Curseforge, etc.), you must credit me and link to this page and/or my profile. If you would like to use this in your public resourcepack, please ask me first, and include credit and a link to this page both in a credits.txt in the resourcepack file and in the description. Usage must be a modification or addition to your pack, not a repost. If you see anyone using my content without permission, please let me know so I can sort it out :)
